overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a nighttime journey through a cyberpunk metropolis. The camera moves steadily along an elevated monorail track above wet, neon-lit streets lined with towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements. The scene features prominent pink and purple neon signage, reflective wet asphalt, and dense urban architecture characteristic of Night City from Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated monorail track through neon-lit commercial canyon

events.description: Japanese text UI elements appear at bottom left corner of screen

agents.ego_description: moving steadily forward along the elevated monorail track above the city streets

large pink neon sign displaying HOTEL with Japanese characters and TENGU logo
tall vertical billboard featuring FEEL LIKE CELEBRITY text with stylized portrait
tall building with illuminated windows and multiple neon advertisements

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated monorail track cutting through a dense cyberpunk cityscape at night. The camera moves forward steadily above wet streets, with a prominent pink HOTEL sign visible on the right and a large celebrity billboard on the left. Neon lights reflect off the rain-slicked asphalt below as vehicles pass underneath the track.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep urban canyon with converging architecture

events.description: track curves slightly to the right revealing deeper city vista ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the elevated track as the path curves gently through the dense urban environment

entered.detail: distant view of the city center with密集 clusters of illuminated towers

segments.scene_description: As the journey continues, the track curves gently rightward through the urban canyon. The celebrity billboard moves closer on the left while the hotel sign passes out of view behind. The city opens up ahead revealing a dense vista of illuminated towers, with the monorail track leading deeper into the neon-lit metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward glide along an elevated monorail track that transitions from a narrow urban corridor into a vast, illuminated cityscape. It begins by moving steadily above rain-slicked streets, where a prominent pink hotel sign on the right and a large celebrity billboard on the left frame the view of vehicles passing below. As the camera advances, the track curves gently rightward, causing the hotel sign to recede behind the camera while the celebrity billboard looms closer on the left. The scene then opens up as the urban canyon expands, revealing a dense vista of towering skyscrapers and glowing neon lights. Finally, the camera pushes deeper into the heart of the metropolis, following the line of the track toward the distant, shimmering horizon of the city.
